ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographic center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographic center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator (e.g., confirmed cases, deaths, recoveries) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., number, percentage) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the indicator is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., case, death, hospitalization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_category_map" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., national daily data, WHO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_trail_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded data file in MB */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data upload (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., range, threshold) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value for the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data is valid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_results_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES data_validation_rules ("rule_id")
)
